sections.one_line: Automatic creation of covenant rules from user behavioral instructions
CovenantRule fields and metadata for defining rule behavior and scope
Default tenant covenants for messaging, privacy, cost warnings, brevity, and escalation
Post-write rule validation for duplicates, conflicts, supersession, and rewrites
Managing covenant rules: list active rules, update them, or soft-remove them
Classifying instructions as enforced behavioral constraints or standing automation rules
Module paths for covenant rules, contract parsing, validation, and gate enforcement
